subject: B01
title: 民用航空法及相關法規(航務)

questions.question: 航空器使用人指以航空器從事飛航作業之
questions.question_en: Operator of an aircraft is referred to

questions.question: 組員指由航空器使用人指派於
questions.question_en: Crew is referred to personnel assigned by the operator to work
questions.A: 飛航時在航空器內工作之人員。
questions.B: 飛航時在地面工作之人員。
questions.C: 地面時在航空 器內工作之人員。

questions.question: 下列何者為飛航組員?
questions.question_en: Which of the following is a member of flight crew?

questions.question: 下列哪一項是巡航駕駛員的資格/限制?
questions.question_en: What is the qualification or limitation of a cruise relief pilot?
questions.A: 符合正駕駛員審查資格。
questions.C: 僅能於巡航時擔任接替正 駕駛員任務
questions.B_en: Has completed the cruise relief pilot training.
questions.C_en: May perform pilot tasks of that type of aircraft during cruise flight.

questions.question: 備用機場包括：
questions.question_en: Alternate airport includes:

questions.question: 飛機為起飛目的，開始移動時起至著陸後停止移動時止之時間定義為：
questions.question_en: The total time from the moment an airplane first moves for the purpose of taking off until the moment it finally comes to rest after landing is called:

questions.question: 航空器起飛離地至降落接觸地面之時間，除相關維護手冊另有規定外，為航空器、發動 機、螺旋槳、各項裝備及其零組件計算及登錄使用時間用。此時間稱為：
questions.question_en: The total time from the moment an aircraft lifts off the ground until the moment it touches down at the end of the flight. It is for calculation and record keeping of service time of the aircraft, engine, propeller, installations and equipment thereof, unless the maintenance manual requires otherwise. This time is called:

questions.question: 機場最低飛航限度：指機場適於起降之限度，通常以 _____ 來表示。
questions.question_en: Airport minima provides take-off and landing limitations of the airport. The standard is expressed in terms of:

questions.question: 指按機艙內氣壓相對於標準狀況之大氣壓力換算所得之高度稱為：
questions.question_en: A cabin pressure expressed in terms of altitude that corresponds to that pressure in the Standard Atmosphere is called:

questions.question: 決定實際高度為低於六十公尺 (二百呎)但不低於三十公尺(一百呎)及跑道視程低於五 百五十公尺但不低於三百公尺之精確儀器進場及降落作業稱為：
questions.question_en: A precision instrument approach and landing with a decision height lower than 60 m (200 ft) but not lower than 30 m (100 ft) and runway visual range less than 550 m but not less than 300 m is called:

questions.question: 何謂大型航空器?
questions.question_en: Large aircraft refers to
questions.A: 最大起飛重量：飛機大於五千公斤、直昇機大於二千五百公斤之航空器。
questions.B: 最大 起飛重量：飛機大於五千七百公斤、直昇機大於三千一百七十五公斤之航空器。
questions.C: 最大起飛重量：飛機大於七千七百公斤、直昇機大於三千八百五十公斤之航空器。
questions.A_en: An airplane of a maximum certificated take-off mass of over 5000 kg, or a helicopter of a maximum certificated take-off mass of over 2500 kg.
questions.B_en: An airplane of a maximum certificated take-off mass of over 5700 kg, or a helicopter of a maximum certificated take-off mass of over 3175 kg.
questions.C_en: An airplane of a maximum certificated take-off mass of over 7700 kg, or a helicopter of a maximum certificated take-off mass of over 3850 kg.

questions.question: 何謂小型航空器?
questions.question_en: Small aircraft refers to
questions.A: 最大起飛重量：飛機小於五千公斤、直昇機小於二千五百公斤之航空器。
questions.B: 最大 起飛重量：飛機小於五千七百公斤、直昇機小於三千一百七十五公斤之航空器。
questions.C: 最大起飛重量：飛機小於七千七百公斤、直昇機小於三千八百五十公斤之航空器。
questions.A_en: An airplane of a maximum certificated take-off mass of 5000 kg or less, or a helicopter of a maximum certificated take-off mass of 2500 kg or less.
questions.B_en: An airplane of a maximum certificated take-off mass of 5700 kg or less, or a helicopter of a maximum certificated take-off mass of 3175 kg or less.
questions.C_en: An airplane of a maximum certificated take-off mass of 7700 kg or less, or a helicopter of a maximum certificated take-off mass of 3850 kg or less.

questions.question: 何謂飛航計畫?
questions.question_en: What is the definition of flight plan?
questions.A: 指向飛航業務單位提供有關航空器意欲飛航或部份飛航之特定資料。
questions.B: 指依氣 象、航空器性能、油量需求、航路架構及其他操作限制等相關資料交互運算構成安全可 行之飛航計畫，以提供飛航組員操作航空器所需之航行資訊。
questions.A_en: Specified information provided to air traffic services units, relative to an intended flight or portion of a flight of an aircraft.
questions.B_en: The operator's plan for the safe conduct of the flight based on consideration of meteorological conditions, aircraft performance, fuel requirements, flight route structure, other operating limitations and relevant expected conditions on the route to be followed and at the aerodromes concerned.

questions.question: 何謂操作飛航計畫
questions.question_en: What is the definition of operational flight plan?
questions.A: 指向飛航業務單位提供有關航空器意欲飛航或部份飛航之特定資料。
questions.B: 指依氣 象、航空器性能、油量需求、航路架構及其他操作限制等相關資料交互運算構成安全可 行之飛航計畫，以提供飛航組員操作航空器所需之航行資訊。
questions.A_en: Specified information provided to air traffic services units, relative to an intended flight or portion of a flight of an aircraft.
questions.B_en: The operator's plan for the safe conduct of the flight based on consideration of meteorological conditions, aircraft performance, fuel requirements, flight route structure, other operating limitations and relevant expected conditions on the route to be followed and at the aerodromes concerned.

questions.question: 飛航中遇有危及航空器或人員安全之緊急情況發生時，機長得為一切緊急處置。如該緊 急處置違反當地國家有關法令規章時，機長除應立即通知當地主管機關外，並應於_____ 小時內通知民航局。
questions.question_en: In an in-flight emergency situation requiring immediate action, the pilot in command may deviate from any rule or article to the extent required to meet that emergency. Each pilot-in-command who deviates from a rule or article shall notify the appropriate local authorities without delay. The pilot-in-command shall also notify CAA within _____ hours.

questions.question: 航空器使用人應確使其駕駛員於執行職務時，熟知其______等有關之規則及程序。
questions.question_en: An operator shall ensure that all pilots are familiar with the laws, regulations and procedures, pertinent to the performance of their duties, prescribed for ______, relating thereto.

questions.question: 航空器使用人或其指定之代理人，應負飛航安全及飛航作業管制之責任。前項飛航作業 管制得由航空器使用人指派______執行。
questions.question_en: An operator or a designated representative shall have responsibility for operational control. Responsibility for operational control shall be delegated only to ______.
questions.B_en: to both the PIC and the dispatcher
questions.C_en: either the PIC or the dispatcher

questions.question: 航空器使用人應利用所有資訊管道，並於確保各項直接影響______之設施均已完備後， 始得飛航。
questions.question_en: An operator shall ensure that a flight will not be commenced unless it has been ascertained by every reasonable means available that facilities directly required on such flights ______ are adequate for the type of operation for which the flight is to be conducted and are adequately operated for this purpose.
questions.C: 航空器飛航或旅客安全
questions.D: 航空器飛航及旅客安全
questions.A_en: for the safe operation of the aircraft
questions.B_en: for the protection of the passengers
questions.C_en: for the safe operation of the aircraft OR the protection of the passengers
questions.D_en: for the safe operation of the aircraft AND the protection of the passengers

questions.question: 航空器使用人應檢附______，報請民航局審查合格並發給______核准項目表後，始可從 事民用航空運輸作業。
questions.question_en: An operator shall not engage in civil air operations unless the submitted ________ (ICAO format) is approved and the ________ is issued by CAA.

questions.question: 航空器使用人應設置何全職且適任之主管，並報民航局備查。
questions.question_en: What kind of full-time and qualified administrative personnel in company shall an operator arrange? The arrangement of such personnel shall be reported to CAA for acceptance.

questions.question: 運輸業航務主管除應熟悉與其業務相關各類手冊、營運規範及相關民航法規外，並應具 備下列條件之一：
questions.question_en: No person may serve as the Director of Operations of a transport operator unless he/she knows the content of the operator’s operations manual, operations specifications and all other pertinent regulations and rules that are necessary for the proper performance of his duties and?
questions.A: 持有或曾持有民航業運輸駕駛員檢定證並擔任小型航空器機長三年以上經驗。
questions.B: 持有或曾持有民航業運輸駕駛員檢定證並擔任大型航空器機長一年以上經驗。
questions.C: 持有 或曾持有民航業運輸駕駛員檢定證並擔任大型航空器機長三年以上經驗。
questions.A_en: Holds or has held an airline transport pilot licence and rating and has at least three years of experience as pilot in command of a small aircraft
questions.B_en: Holds or has held an airline transport pilot licence and rating and has at least one years of experience as pilot in command of a large aircraft
questions.C_en: Holds or has held an airline transport pilot licence and rating and has at least three years of experience as pilot in command of a large aircraft

questions.question: 運輸業機隊主管應具備下列何條件：
questions.question_en: What qualification shall an air transport operator's fleet manager need to have?
questions.A: 持有至少一種該航空器使用人所用機型之有效民航運輸駕駛員檢定證並擔任大型航 空器機長一年以上經驗。
questions.B: 持有至少一種該航空器使用人所用機型之有效民航運輸駕 駛員檢定證並擔任大型航空器機長二年以上經驗。
questions.C: 持有至少一種該航空器使用人所 用機型之有效民航運輸駕駛員檢定證並擔任大型航空器機長三年以上經驗。
questions.A_en: Holds a valid air transport pilot licence with at least one of the type ratings of the aircraft used by the operator and has at least one year of experience as pilot in command of a large aircraft;
questions.B_en: Holds a valid air transport pilot licence with at least one of the type ratings of the aircraft used by the operator and has at least two years of experience as pilot in command of a large aircraft;
questions.C_en: Holds a valid air transport pilot licence with at least one of the type ratings of the aircraft used by the operator and has at least three years of experience as pilot in command of a large aircraft;

questions.question: 運輸業機務主管應具備下列何條件：
questions.question_en: What qualification shall an air transport operator's aircraft maintenance manager need to have?
questions.A: 運輸類航空器五年以上之維護經驗?，且其中有一年以上曾擔任管理職之經驗。
questions.B: 運輸類航空器三年以上之維護經驗?，且其中有一年以上曾擔任管理職之經驗。
questions.C: 運 輸類航空器二年以上之維護經驗?，且其中有一年以上曾擔任管理職之經驗。
questions.A_en: Has an experience in the maintenance on aircraft of transportation category for 5 years or more, and at least one year of which was in a supervisory capacity.
questions.B_en: Has an experience in the maintenance on aircraft of transportation category for 3 years or more, and at least one year of which was in a supervisory capacity.
questions.C_en: Has an experience in the maintenance on aircraft of transportation category for 2 years or more, and at least one year of which was in a supervisory capacity.

questions.question: 運輸業品管主管應具備下列何條件：
questions.question_en: What qualification shall an air transport operator's quality control manager need to have?
questions.A: 持有有效之航空器維修工程師檢定證一年以上，並有民用航空運輸業或檢定合格之 維修廠運輸類航空器三年以上之維護經驗，且其中有一年以上維護檢驗員或品保人員之 經驗。
questions.B: 持有有效之航空器維修工程師檢定證二年以上，並有民用航空運輸業或檢定 合格之維修廠運輸類航空器四年以上之維護經驗，且其中有一年以上維護檢驗員或品保 人員之經驗。
questions.C: 持有有效之航空器維修工程師檢定證三年以上，並有民用航空運輸業 或檢定合格之維修廠運輸類航空器三年以上之維護經驗，且其中有一年以上維護檢驗員 或品保人員之經驗。
questions.A_en: Holds a valid aircraft maintenance engineer certificate for at least 1 year; and has at least 3 years of diversified maintenance experience on aircraft in a civil air transport enterprise or certificated repair station, 1 year of which must be in the capacity as maintenance inspector or quality assurance staff.
questions.B_en: Holds a valid aircraft maintenance engineer certificate for at least 2 years; and has at least 4 years of diversified maintenance experience on aircraft in a civil air transport enterprise or certificated repair station, 1 year of which must be in the capacity as maintenance inspector or quality assurance staff.
questions.C_en: Holds a valid aircraft maintenance engineer certificate for at least 3 years; and has at least 3 years of diversified maintenance experience on aircraft in a civil air transport enterprise or certificated repair station, 1 year of which must be in the capacity as maintenance inspector or quality assurance staff.

questions.question: 飛安主管除應熟悉與其業務相關各類手冊、營運規範及相關民航法規外，並應具備下列 哪種條件?
questions.question_en: No person may serve as Director of Flight Safety unless he/she knows the operator’s manual, operations specifications and the applicable rules and regulations pertinent to the performance of his duties and
questions.A: 曾接受國內、外航空安全管理專業課程並領有結業證書?，並擔任航務、機務或飛安 相關職務一年以上之經驗。
questions.B: 曾接受國內、外航空安全管理專業課程並領有結業證 書?，並擔任航務、機務或飛安相關職務二年以上之經驗。
questions.C: 曾接受國內、外航空安 全管理專業課程並領有結業證書?，並擔任航務、機務或飛安相關職務三年以上之經驗。
questions.A_en: Has received training for professional Flight Safety Management Programme and holds the accomplishment certificate for such programme; and has at least 1 year experience in the areas of flight operations, maintenance or flight safety
questions.B_en: Has received training for professional Flight Safety Management Programme and holds the accomplishment certificate for such programme; and has at least 2 years experience in the areas of flight operations, maintenance or flight safety.
questions.C_en: Has received training for professional Flight Safety Management Programme and holds the accomplishment certificate for such programme; and has at least 3 years experience in the areas of flight operations, maintenance or flight safety.

questions.question: 航空器使用人應訂定各類飛航作業相關人員_____，報請民航局核准後實施。
questions.question_en: An operator shall establish _____ program for personnel of different areas in operations which will be carried into effect after approval by CAA.

questions.question: 各類飛航作業相關人員訓練計畫應包括_____，以確保其所有人員瞭解其個別職責，及 在飛航作業中各類人員職責間相互之關係。
questions.question_en: All flight operations related personnel shall include _____ into the training program to ensure they are properly instructed in their particular duties and responsibilities and the relationship of such duties to the operation as a whole.

questions.question: 具有下列何要件之人員，得於機場活動區範圍內操控航空器之滑行?
questions.question_en: Personnel who may control taxiing aircraft on the ground in the air side of an airport shall meet which of the following qualifications
questions.A: 已獲取航空器使用人之授權
questions.B: 具備使用無線電通話之能力
questions.C: 已由合格人員教授 有關機場地物位置、路線、記號、燈光及航管之訊號、指示、用詞、程序等相關課程， 並能符合航空器於機場作安全移動之作業標準
questions.A_en: Has been duly authorized by the operator or a designated agent
questions.B_en: Is qualified to use the radio
questions.C_en: Has received instruction from a competent person in respect of aerodrome layout routes, signs, markings, lights, air traffic control signals and instructions, radio phraseology and procedures, and is able to conform to the operational standards required f

questions.question: 具有何資格者，得啟動直昇機之旋翼或滑行
questions.question_en: who is authorized to start helicopter's rotor blade and taxi a helicopter

questions.question: 航空器裝載客、貨、郵件飛航時，不得模擬演練緊急或不正常狀況。
questions.question_en: Aircraft in flight carrying passenger, cargo or mail may not simulate emergency or abnormal situation.

questions.question: 航空器使用人應訂定操作程序以確保航空器實施精確進場時，於降落外形及姿態下，能 以適當安全高度通過跑道頭。
questions.question_en: An operator shall establish operational procedures designed to ensure that an airplane being used to conduct precision approaches crosses the threshold by a safe margin, with the airplane in the landing configuration and attitude.

questions.question: 運輸業航空器使用人得訂定其各航路之最低飛航高度，但不得低於該航路所在國已公布 者。
questions.question_en: An air transport operator may be permitted to establish minimum flight altitudes for those routes flown for which minimum flight altitudes have been established by the state, provided they shall not be less than those established by that state.

questions.question: 運輸業航空器使用人於訂定機場之最低飛航限度時，應考量下列何情形?
questions.question_en: When establishing the aerodrome operating minima, the air transport operator shall take full consideration of
questions.A: 機型之性能及操作特性
questions.B: 飛航組員之組合及其能力與經驗
questions.C: 航空器上用於導航 及控制飛航路線於進場及誤失進場之裝備
questions.A_en: The type performance and operating characteristics of the aircraft
questions.B_en: The composition of the flight crew, their competence and experience
questions.C_en: The equipment available on the aircraft for the purpose of navigation and control of the flight path during the approach to landing and the missed approach

questions.question: 運輸業航空器使用人於訂定機場之最低飛航限度時，應考量
questions.question_en: When establishing the aerodrome operating minima, the air transport operator shall take full consideration of
questions.A: 跑道之長寬與特性或直昇機安全起降所需之距離。
questions.B: 目視及非目視地面助航裝備 及其性能。
questions.C: 進場及誤失進場範圍內之障礙物及儀器進場之超越障礙物高度。
questions.A_en: The dimensions and characteristics of the runway that may be selected for use
questions.B_en: The adequacy and performance of the available visual and non-visual ground aids
questions.C_en: The obstacles in the approach and missed approach areas and the obstacle clearance altitude/height for the instrument approach procedures

questions.question: 運輸業航空器使用人訂定最低飛航高度時，應考量
questions.question_en: When an air transport operator evaluates minima flight altitudes, the operator shall take full consideration of
questions.A: 航空器定位儀器之精確度及可靠度
questions.B: 高度表指示之可能誤差
questions.A_en: The accuracy and reliability with which the position of the aircraft can be determined
questions.B_en: The inaccuracies in the indications of the altimeters used

questions.question: 航空器使用人應保存最近_____個月燃油及滑油之使用紀錄以便查核。
questions.question_en: An operator shall maintain records of fuel and oil consumption for last _____ months for CAA inspection.

questions.question: 運輸業航空器使用人所使用之航空器，如其機型為該航空器使用人首次使用者，飛機於 營運前應先行飛航至少_______小時，以熟練各項作業，確保安全。
questions.question_en: An air transport operator shall ensure the operation competency and safety for an aircraft type newly introduced into service before operations for compensation or hire?. In the case of airplane, an operator shall have flown at least ____ hours of proving tests.

questions.question: 運輸業航空器使用人所使用之航空器，如其機型為該航空器使用人首次使用者，直昇機 於營運前應先行飛航至少_______小時，以熟練各項作業，確保安全。
questions.question_en: An air transport operator shall ensure the operation competency and safety for an aircraft type newly introduced into service before operations for compensation or hire?. In the case of helicopter, an operator shall have flown at least ____ hours of proving tests.

questions.question: 運輸業航空器各次之飛航，航空器使用人應指派_____名駕駛員擔任機長。機長失能時 其接替順位，航空器使用人應於航務相關手冊中規定。
questions.question_en: For each flight of an air transport operation, the operator shall designate _____ pilot to act as pilot-in-command. An operator shall establish an order of succession in the company’s pertinent manuals of flight operations in the event of the pilot-in-command’s incapacitation.

questions.question: 航空器使用人應保存組員之飛航時間、飛航執勤期間、休息期間、執勤期間及待命期間 之紀錄至少連續_______個月。
questions.question_en: An operator shall maintain current records of flight time, flight duty periods, rest periods, duty periods and standby of all its crew members for a continuous _____-month period.

questions.question: 運輸業標準飛航組員於連續二十四小時內，國際航線飛航時間超過八小時但未滿十小 時，飛航組員於執勤完畢後應獲得連續 _______ 小時以上之休息。
questions.question_en: For an air transport operator, when a pilot of a standard flight crew composition has flown on international flight exceeding 8 hours but less than 10 hours during any 24 consecutive hours, the pilot shall be given a rest period no less than _______ hours.

questions.question: 運輸業標準飛航組員於連續二十四小時內，國際航線飛航時間最多不得超過 _______ 小時。
questions.question_en: For an air transport operator, the maximum consecutive flight time for a pilot of a standard flight crew composition on an international flight may not exceed? ______ hours.

questions.question: 運輸業標準飛航組員於連續二十四小時內，國內航線飛航時間最多不得超過 _______ 小時。
questions.question_en: For an air transport operator, the maximum consecutive flight time for a pilot of a standard flight crew composition on a domestic flight may not exceed? ______ hours.

questions.question: 運輸業標準飛航組員於連續二十四小時內，國際航線飛航時間未超過八小時，飛航組員 於執勤完畢後應獲得連續 _______ 小時以上之休息。
questions.question_en: For an air transport operator, when a pilot of a standard flight crew composition has flown on international flight not exceeding 8 hours during any 24 consecutive hours, the pilot shall be given a rest period no less than _______ hours.

questions.question: 運輸業標準飛航組員如國內航線及國際航線混合派遣時，其飛航時間限度應依_____之 規定。
questions.question_en: Flight time limitation for an air transport pilot of a standard flight crew composition on a mixed domestic and international flight should follow that of _______.

questions.question: 運輸業加強飛航組員於備有睡眠設備之航空器，飛航時間限度連續二十四小時內不得超 過_____小時?。
questions.question_en: An air transport operator may assign a multiple flight crew pilot to a flight duty not exceeding _____ hours during any 24 consecutive hours on board an aircraft of which is provided with sleeping berths.

questions.question: 運輸業加強飛航組員於未備有睡眠設備之航空器，應於客艙內備有休息座椅，其飛航時 間限度連續二十四小時內不得超過_____小時。
questions.question_en: If the aircraft is not equipped with sleeping berths but is provided with resting seats in the passenger cabin, a multiple flight crew pilot of an air transport operator may not exceed _____ hours flight duty.

questions.question: 運輸業雙飛航組員於備有睡眠設備之航空器之飛航時間限度連續二十四小時內不得超 過_____小時。
questions.question_en: An air transport operator may assign a double flight crew pilot to a flight duty not exceeding _____ hours during any 24 consecutive hours on board an aircraft of which is provided with sleeping berths.

questions.question: 運輸業雙飛航組員於未備有睡眠設備之航空器，應於客艙內備有休息座椅，其飛航時間 限度連續二十四小時內不得超過_____小時。
questions.question_en: If the aircraft is not equipped with sleeping berths, the aircraft shall have rest seats in the passenger cabin for the pilots. A double flight crew pilot of an air transport operator may fly no more than _____ hours on board such aircraft.

questions.question: 運輸業標準飛航組員連續二十四小時內，國內航線其飛航時間不得超過八小時，於執勤 完畢後應給予連續 _____ 小時以上之休息。
questions.question_en: An air transport operator may schedule a pilot to fly no more than 8 hours for domestic flights during any consecutive 24 hours. The pilot shall be given a rest period of no less than _____ consecutive hours at the end of flight duty.

questions.question: 運輸業加強飛航組員於連續24小時內如飛航時間超過十二小時，任務完畢後，應給予連 續_____小時以上之休息。
questions.question_en: If the multiple flight crew pilot of an air transport operator has flown more than 12 hours in consecutive 24 hours, then a rest period of no less than _____ consecutive hours must be provided.

questions.question: 運輸業加強飛航組員於連續24小時內如飛航時間超過十小時但少於十二小時，任務完畢 後，應給予連續_____小時以上之休息。
questions.question_en: If the multiple flight crew pilot of an air transport operator has flown more than 10 hours but less than 12 hours in consecutive 24 hours, then a rest period of no less than _____ consecutive hours must be provided.

questions.question: 運輸業雙飛航組員於連續二十四小時內飛航時間超過十六小時，任務完畢後，應給予連 續_____小時以上之休息。
questions.question_en: If the double flight crew pilot of an air transport operator has flown more than 16 hours in consecutive 24 hours, then a rest period of no less than _____ consecutive hours must be provided.

questions.question: 運輸業雙飛航組員於連續二十四小時內飛航時間未超過十六小時，任務完畢後，應給予 連續____小時以上之休息。
questions.question_en: If the double flight crew pilot of an air transport operator has flown less than 16 hours in consecutive 24 hours, then a rest period of no less than _____ consecutive hours must be provided.

questions.question: 運輸業標準飛航組員連續七日內，應給予連續_____小時以上之休息。
questions.question_en: A standard flight crew pilot of an air transport operator shall be given a rest period of _____ consecutive hours during any consecutive 7 days.

questions.question: 以標準飛航組員派遣之運輸業駕駛員或普通業飛航組員，其連續七天內之總飛航時間不 得超過_______小時。
questions.question_en: An air transport pilot who is assigned to act as a member of standard flight crew or a general aviation pilot, the total flight time shall not exceed _____ hours during any consecutive 7 days.

questions.question: 運輸業加強飛航組員在連續七日內，應給予連續_____小時以上之休息。
questions.question_en: A multiple flight crew pilot of an air transport operator shall be given a rest period of _____ consecutive hours during any consecutive 7 days.

questions.question: 運輸業雙飛航組員連續七日內，應給予連續_____小時以上之休息。
questions.question_en: A double flight crew pilot of an air transport operator shall be given a rest period of _____ consecutive hours during any consecutive 7 days.

questions.question: 運輸業飛航組員之飛航時間，於連續三十日內，其總飛航時間不得超過 _____ 小時。
questions.question_en: Total flight time of an air transport pilot may not exceed _____ hours during any consecutive 30 days.

questions.question: 運輸業飛航組員之飛航時間，於連續九十日內，其總飛航時間不得超過 _____ 小時。
questions.question_en: Total flight time of an air transport pilot may not exceed _____ hours during any consecutive 90 days.

questions.question: 飛航組員之飛航時間，於連續十二個月內，其總飛航時間不得超過 _____ 小時。
questions.question_en: Total flight time of a pilot may not exceed _____ hours during any consecutive 12 months.

questions.question: 運輸業標準飛航組員之飛航執勤期間限度，國內航線一次可連續執勤____小時。
questions.question_en: An air transport operator may assign a standard flight crew pilot to a flight duty period up to _____ consecutive hours for domestic flights.

questions.question: 運輸業標準飛航組員之飛航執勤期間限度，國際航線一次可連續執勤____小時。
questions.question_en: An air transport operator may assign a standard flight crew pilot to a flight duty period up to _____ consecutive hours for international flights.

questions.question: 運輸業加強飛航組員之飛航執勤期間限度一次可連續執勤____小時。
questions.question_en: An air transport operator may assign a multiple flight crew pilot to a flight duty period up to _____ consecutive hours.

questions.question: 運輸業雙飛航組員之飛航執勤期間限度一次可連續執勤____小時。
questions.question_en: An air transport operator may assign a double flight crew pilot to a flight duty period up to _____ consecutive hours.

questions.question: 運輸業飛航組員於飛航執勤期間限度內，除飛航訓練外，其起飛降落次數國際航線不得 超過_____次。
questions.question_en: Except for flight training, an air transport pilot shall not perform more than _____ times of take-off/landing for international flight in any flight duty period.

questions.question: 運輸業飛航組員於飛航執勤期間限度內，除飛航訓練外，其起飛降落次數國內航線不得 超過_____次。
questions.question_en: Except for flight training, an air transport pilot shall not perform more than _____ times of take-off/landing for domestic flight in any flight duty period.

questions.question: 運輸業飛航組員於報到後至未開始執行飛航任務前，經航空器使用人安排其至休息處所 休息且休息時間超過_____小時者，此段休息時間不列入飛航執勤期間限度計算。
questions.question_en: After reporting for flight duty but before commencing the flight, if an air transport pilot has rested for more than _____ hours in a proper rest place arranged by the operator, such rest period may be excluded from the flight duty period.

questions.question: 運輸業飛航組員已開始執行飛航任務，如因故遭遇班機延誤需延長飛航執勤期間者，應 由航空器使用人安排其至休息處所休息____小時以上，始得延長其休息時間一半之飛航 執勤期間，且其延長後加計中途休息期間之總飛航執勤期間不得超過連續二十四小時之 限制。
questions.question_en: After the commencement of a flight duty, no prolongation of a flight duty period is allowed unless the air transport pilot has rested for more than _____ hours in a proper rest place arranged by the operator. On occasions of flight delay, the flight duty period may be extended by half of such rest period; in no circumstances should the total period of the extended flight duty period plus the rest period exceed 24 consecutive hours.

questions.question: 運輸業組員調派時間應列入執勤期間。
questions.question_en: Time spent positioning is part of a duty period for an air transport pilot.

questions.question: 如運輸業航空器使用人擔任政府緊急運輸任務並經民航局核准者，其所屬執勤飛航組員 飛航時間於連續十二個月內，其總飛航時間得增至______小時。
questions.question_en: Upon CAA's approval, when an air transport operator engages in government emergency transportation missions, the flight time limitations for the flight crewmembers in such operation may be extended up to _____ hours during any 12 consecutive calendar month period.

questions.question: 運輸業航空器使用人應於航空器起飛前確使所有乘客知悉下列事項：
questions.question_en: Before the aircraft commences take-off, an air transport operator shall ensure that all passengers are made familiar with
questions.A: 座椅安全帶繫緊及鬆開之說明。
questions.C: 救生背心位置及使用方法。
questions.A_en: The use of seat belts, including instructions on how to fasten and unfasten the seat belts.
questions.C_en: The location and use of life jackets.

questions.question: 航空器使用人應確保組員於航空器起飛、降落時，告知乘客繫妥安全帶或肩帶。飛航中 遭遇亂流或緊急情況時，組員並應告知乘客採取適當之行動。
questions.question_en: An operator shall ensure that all passengers are informed to fasten seat belts or shoulder harness for take-off and landing. When encountering turbulence or emergency in flight, passengers shall also be informed to take appropriate actions by the crew member.

questions.question: 備有_____之運輸業航空器，於執行載客任務時，在該裝備之啟動裝置未備妥可用前， 不得於地面移動及飛航。
questions.question_en: When an air transport aircraft engages in passenger-carrying operations with the equipage of _____, it shall not be moved on ground or operated for flight, unless the installed equipment has been armed for evacuation.
questions.A: 自動充氣緊急撤離輔助裝備

questions.question: 乘客隨身行李應置於_____，以避免滑動或掉落，並不得阻礙緊急裝備之取用及緊急撤 離通道。但經民航局核准者，不在此限。
questions.question_en: Carry-on baggage shall be securely stowed in _____ in order to prevent shifting or falling from its stowage compartment unless CAA approved to do so. In addition all baggage or cargo must be stowed in a manner not hindering the use of any emergency equipment and the access to the emergency exits.

questions.question: 航空人員、航空器上工作人員或乘客於航空器內吸菸者，_____ 應報請內政部警政署航 空警察局依民用航空法規定處理。
questions.question_en: Any airman, cabin crew or passengers smoking in an aircraft, the _____ shall report to Aviation Police Office to comply with Civil Aviation Act.

questions.question: 運輸業航空器使用人不得於其航空器內提供酒精性飲料予下列人員：
questions.question_en: An air transport operator shall ensure that no alcoholic beverage is served in its aircraft to the person who:
questions.C: 依規定持械登機之人員
questions.B_en: Escorts a person or is under escort.

questions.question: 航空器使用人於航空器_____階段，不得提供餐飲服務。
questions.question_en: An operator shall ensure that no drinks or meals are served to passengers while the aircraft is in the phases of ______

questions.question: 除航空器維護簽放紀錄應保存至少一年外，航空器使用人應保存完整飛航準備文件至少 _____ 個月。
questions.question_en: Except for the aircraft maintenance release record that shall be kept for a period of one year or more, an operator shall retain completed flight preparation documents for at least _____ months.

questions.question: (運輸業)每一飛航均應備有操作飛航計畫，由_____認可後簽署；如情形許可，簽派員 應併予簽署。該計畫之副本應由航空器使用人或其業務代理人保存或置於起飛機場之管 理機關。
questions.question_en: An operational flight plan shall be completed for every intended flight for air transport operations. The operational flight plan shall be approved and signed by the _____ and if situation allows, the flight operations officer/flight dispatcher. A copy shall be filed with the operator or a designated agent.

questions.question: (運輸業)航空器使用人應於_____或操作飛航計畫中規定航路上之最低飛航高度及目的 地機場與備用機場之最低飛航限度。
questions.question_en: An air transport operator shall describe in the _____ or operational flight plan, minimum en-route flight altitudes, and operating minima for destination and alternate aerodrome.

questions.question: (運輸業)航空器使用人依照儀器飛航規則製作之操作飛航計畫中，至少應列有一處備用 機場，但有下列何情形不在此限。
questions.question_en: (Air transport operations) For a flight to be conducted in accordance with the instrument flight rules, at least one destination alternate aerodrome shall be selected and specified in the operational flight plan, unless:
questions.A: 飛航時間少於六小時且目的地機場之天氣情況，於預計到達之前後一小時內，符合 目視天氣情況
questions.B: 目的地機場係一孤立區域，無適當之備用機場者
questions.A_en: The duration of the flight is less than 6 hours flight time and the meteorological conditions prevailing are such that at the estimated time of arrival at the aerodrome of intended landing, and for a period one hour before and one hour after such time, approach and landing may be made under visual meteorological conditions.
questions.B_en: The aerodrome of intended landing is isolated and there is no suitable destination alternate aerodrome.

questions.question: 直昇機選擇使用海上備用機場，除應考量重要控制系統及重要機件之機械可靠性，據以 判定備用機場之適合性外，並應符合下列何條件
questions.question_en: When determining suitable off-shore alternates for helicopter operations, mechanical reliability of critical control systems and critical components shall be considered and the following taken into account:
questions.A: 僅於通過不得轉回點後始得使用海上備用機場，未通過不得轉回點前僅得使用陸上 備用機場
questions.B: 於到達海上備用機場前，直昇機於單一發動機性能失效之情形下仍能安全 飛航
questions.C: 於得以攜帶足夠油量飛航至陸上備用機場時，不得使用海上備用機場
questions.A_en: The offshore alternates shall be used only beyond a point of no return. Prior to the point of no return on-shore alternates shall be used;
questions.B_en: One engine inoperative performance capability shall be attainable prior to arrival at the alternate;
questions.C_en: Offshore alternates should not be used when it is possible to carry enough fuel to have an on-shore alternate

questions.question: (運輸業)在何種條件下，操作飛航計畫應選定起飛備用機場?
questions.question_en: (Air transport operation) Under what condition shall a take-off alternate aerodrome be selected and specified in the operational flight plan?
questions.A: 起飛機場天氣在最低飛航降落限度以下。
questions.B: 因某種原因不能轉回降落於起飛之機 場。
questions.A_en: The weather conditions at the aerodrome of departure are at or below the applicable aerodrome operating minima.
questions.B_en: It would not be possible to return to the aerodrome of departure for any reason.

questions.question: (運輸業)雙發動機飛機，起飛備用機場位置應於離開起飛機場多少距離之內：
questions.question_en: (Air transport operation) The take-off alternate aerodrome of an airplane having two power-units shall be located within which distance from the aerodrome of departure:
questions.A: 不超過以雙發動機之巡航速度作一小時飛航之距離
questions.B: 不超過以單一發動機之巡航 速度作一小時飛航之距離
questions.C: 不超過以單一發動機之巡航速度作二小時飛航之距離
questions.A_en: Not more than a distance equivalent to one hour at the twin-engine cruise speed
questions.B_en: Not more than a distance equivalent to one hour at the single-engine cruise speed
questions.C_en: Not more than a distance equivalent to two hours at the single-engine cruise speed

questions.question: (運輸業)三發動機以上之飛機，起飛備用機場位置應於離開起飛機場多少距離之內：
questions.question_en: (Air transport operation) The take-off alternate aerodrome of an airplane having three or more power-units shall be located within which distance from the aerodrome of departure:
questions.A: 不超過單一發動機失效之巡航速度作一小時飛航之距離
questions.B: 不超過單一發動機失效 之巡航速度作二小時飛航之距離
questions.C: 不超過雙發動機失效之巡航速度作一小時飛航之 距離
questions.A_en: Not more than a distance equivalent to one hour at the single-engine cruise speed
questions.B_en: Not more than a distance equivalent to two hours at the single-engine cruise speed
questions.C_en: Not more than a distance equivalent to one hour at the twin-engine cruise speed

questions.question: (運輸業)當一機場被選作起飛備用機場時，該機場於航空器預計到達之_____之天氣等 有關資訊，應等於或高於機場最低飛航限度。
questions.question_en: (Air transport operation) For an aerodrome to be selected as a take-off alternate the available information shall indicate, that at least ______ the estimated time of arrival, the conditions will be at or above the aerodrome operating minima for that operation.

questions.question: 航路上之天氣現況或預報符合目視飛航所定之情況時，航空器始得從事目視飛航
questions.question_en: A flight to be conducted in accordance with visual flight rules shall not be commenced unless current meteorological reports or forecasts indicate that the meteorological conditions will be such as to render compliance with these rules.

questions.question: 目的地機場或備用機場之天氣情況低於各該機場最低飛航限度時，航空器始得從事儀器 飛航
questions.question_en: A flight to be conducted in accordance with instrument flight rules shall not be commenced unless information is available which indicates that the conditions at the aerodrome of intended landing will be at or below the aerodrome operating minima.

questions.question: 航空器無________者，不得於已知或預期之結冰天氣狀況下飛航。
questions.question_en: Aircraft without ________ shall not operate in known or forecasted icing weather conditions.

questions.question: 加壓航空器 (或普通業的加壓飛機) 於預知雷雨或惡劣天氣情況下飛航時，航空器使用 人應確保其裝置之氣象雷達作用正常。
questions.question_en: An operator shall ensure that pressurized aircraft (or "pressurized airplane" for General Aviation) operated in expected thunderstorms or severe meteorological conditions is equipped with weather radar and functions normally.

questions.question: 航空器應攜帶足夠之燃油及滑油，計算油量時應考慮下列何因素
questions.question_en: A flight shall not be commenced unless the aircraft carries sufficient fuel and oil to ensure that it can safely complete the flight. While calculating the amount of fuel and oil to be carried, the following must be taken into account:
questions.C: 於目的地機場作儀器進場及誤失進場。
questions.B_en: Expected air traffic control routings and traffic delays.
questions.C_en: Instrument approach and possible missed approach over destination aerodrome.

questions.question: 航空器應攜帶足夠之燃油及滑油，計算油量時應考慮下列何因素
questions.question_en: A flight shall not be commenced unless the aircraft carries sufficient fuel and oil to ensure that it can safely complete the flight. While calculating the amount of fuel and oil to be carried, the following must be taken into account:
questions.A: 於執行操作手冊所列失壓或航路上一具發動機失效之程序
questions.B: 其他可能延誤航空器 降落之情況
questions.C: 經民航局核准供應航空器非預期及不正常燃油消耗所需之應變油量
questions.A_en: The procedures prescribed in the operations manual for loss of pressurization where applicable, or failure of one power-unit while en route
questions.B_en: Any other contingencies that may delay aircraft landing or increased fuel and/or oil consumption
questions.C_en: CAA approved contingency fuel and oil for any other expected and unexpected delay

questions.question: 運輸業往復式活塞發動機之飛機，因飛航時間少於六小時且目的地機場之天氣情況，於 預計到達之前後一小時內，符合目視天氣情況而不需備用機場者，除應攜帶飛抵操作飛 航計畫中之目的地機場油量外，應再攜帶_____分鐘正常巡航油量。
questions.question_en: When a destination alternate is not required due to the duration of the flight is less than 6 hours flight time and the meteorological conditions prevailing are such that at the estimated time of arrival at the aerodrome of intended landing, and for a period one hour before and one hour after such time, approach and landing may be made under visual meteorological conditions, the flight shall carry sufficient fuel to fly to the aerodrome to which the flight is planned and there after for _____ minutes at the cruising level for piston-engined airplane of air transport operations.

questions.question: 運輸業渦輪發動機之飛機，飛航時間少於六小時且目的地機場之天氣情況，於預計到達 之前後一小時內，符合目視天氣情況而不需備用機場者，除應攜帶飛抵操作飛航計畫中 之目的地機場油量外，應再攜帶哪些油量?
questions.question_en: A flight (air transport operations) of a turbine-engined airplane, when a destination alternate aerodrome is not required due to the duration of the flight is less than 6 hours flight time and the meteorological conditions prevailing are such that at the estimated time of arrival at the aerodrome of intended landing, and for a period one hour before and one hour after such time, approach and landing may be made under visual meteorological conditions, shall carry sufficient fuel to allow the aircraft to fly to the aerodrome which the flight is planned and the additional fuel to fly _____.
questions.A: 於標準溫度下在目的地機場標高上空一千五百呎高度以待命空速飛航四十五分鐘油 量及應變油量。
questions.B: 於標準溫度下在目的地機場標高上空一千五百呎高度以待命空速飛 航三十分鐘油量及應變油量。
questions.C: 於標準溫度下在目的地機場標高上空一千五百呎高度 以待命空速飛航十五分鐘油量及應變油量。
questions.A_en: for 45 minutes at holding speed at 1,500 ft above the aerodrome to which the flight is planned under standard temperature conditions and contingency fuel.
questions.B_en: for 30 minutes at holding speed at 1,500 ft above the aerodrome to which the flight is planned under standard temperature conditions and contingency fuel.
questions.C_en: for 15 minutes at holding speed at 3,000 ft above the aerodrome to which the flight is planned under standard temperature conditions and contingency fuel.

questions.question: 運輸業渦輪發動機之飛機需備用機場者，除應攜帶在操作飛航計畫中之目的地機場及進 場、誤失進場油量外，應再攜帶下列何油量
questions.question_en: Turbine-engined airplane of an air transport operations, when a destination alternate aerodrome is required, shall carry sufficient fuel to allow the aircraft to fly to and execute an approach and a missed approach, at the aerodrome to which the flight is planned, and thereafter:
questions.A: 飛抵備用機場所需之油量
questions.B: 於標準溫度下，在備用機場上空一千五百呎高度以待 命空速飛航三十分鐘及進場、降落所需之油量
questions.A_en: To fly to the alternate aerodrom.
questions.B_en: To fly for 30 minutes at holding speed at 1,500 ft above the alternate aerodrome under standard temperature conditions, and approach and land.

questions.question: 渦輪發動機之飛機 (運輸業)，目的地機場係一孤立區域，無適當之備用機場者，除應 攜帶飛抵計畫中之目的地機場油量外，應再攜帶_____小時之正常巡航油量。
questions.question_en: A flight of a turbine-engined airplane (air transport operations), when a destination is isolated and there is no suitable (destination) alternate aerodrome, shall carry sufficient fuel to fly to the aerodrome to which the flight is planned and thereafter for _____ hours at normal cruise consumption.

questions.question: 直昇機依目視飛航規則飛航者，除應攜帶飛抵操作飛航計畫中之目的地機場油量外，應 再攜帶於最佳航程空速下飛行____分鐘所需之油量及應變油量。
questions.question_en: Helicopter flights conducted in accordance with visual flight rules (VFR) shall carry a sufficient amount of fuel to allow the helicopter to fly to the heliport of which the flight is planned and thereafter to fly for a period of _____ minutes at best-range speed and contingency fuel.

questions.question: 直昇機依儀器飛航規則飛航者，運輸業依第五十七條第一項第一款、普通業依第二百十 四條之情況而不需備用機場者，除應攜帶飛抵操作飛航計畫中之目的地機場油量外，應 再攜帶於標準溫度下，在目的地機場標高上空一千五百呎高度以待命空速飛航_____分 鐘及進場、降落所需之油量及應變油量。
questions.question_en: Helicopter flights conducted in accordance with instrument flight rules (IFR) in terms of Article 57, paragraph 1, subparagraph 1 for an air transport operations, or Article 214 for a general aviation operations, when no alternate is required, to fly to the heliport to which the flight is planned, and thereafter to fly for _____ minutes at holding speed at 1,500ft above the destination heliport under standard temperature conditions, and approach and land, and contingency fuel.

questions.question: 直昇機依儀器飛航規則飛航且無適當之備用機場可供使用者，除應攜帶飛抵操作飛航計 畫中之目的地機場油量外，應再攜帶以待命空速飛航_____分鐘所需之油量。
questions.question_en: Helicopter flights conducted in accordance with instrument flight rules (IFR), when no suitable alternate is available, should carry sufficient fuel to fly to the destination aerodrome to which the flight is planned and thereafter for a period of _____minutes at normal cruise.

questions.question: 運輸業航空器飛航於國內航線時，因航程過短或場站加油設施之限制，得採用經民航局 核准之_________從事飛航。
questions.question_en: For an air transport aircraft operating in domestic flights, due to short flight legs or limited refuelling facilities in aerodromes, an operator may use CAA approved ______ for flight operations.

questions.question: 即使攜帶之油量足夠，航空器於飛航中不得再行簽派至另一目的地。
questions.question_en: Althought the fuel on board is sufficient, an aircraft in flight may not be re-dispatched to another destination.

questions.question: 飛機乘客(或乘員)於客艙內或上、下飛機時，航空器使用人不得進行加油作業，但有下 列何情形者，不在此限。
questions.question_en: An airplane shall not be refuelled when passengers are embarking, on board or disembarking unless:
questions.A: 有合格之人員能在旁待命，提供緊急逃生及疏散之指令及引導。
questions.B: 飛機上飛航組 員及地面加油人員已建立雙向通訊管道。
questions.A_en: It is properly attended by qualified personnel ready to initiate and direct an evacuation of the airplane.
questions.B_en: Two-way communication shall be maintained between the ground crew supervising the refuelling and the qualified personnel on board the airplane.

questions.question: 除經民航局核准外，運輸業航空器使用人使用雙渦輪發動機之飛機，於航路中之任一航 點轉降至其適當航路備用機場，不得超過以單發動機失效之正常巡航速度及靜風狀況下 飛航______分鐘之距離。
questions.question_en: Unless the operation has been specifically approved by CAA, an air transport airplane with two turbine power-units shall not be operated on a route where the flight time at single-engine cruise speed to an adequate en-route alternate aerodrome exceeds a _____ minutes under wind calm condition.

questions.question: 航空器於壓力高度_____英呎以上飛航時，應攜帶足供飛航全程全體組員及乘客使用之 氧氣量。
questions.question_en: A flight shall not be commenced unless sufficient stored breathing oxygen is carried to supply the crew and passengers for any period that the cabin pressure altitude in compartments occupied by them will be _____ feet or above.

questions.question: 航空器於壓力高度一萬呎至一萬三千呎間飛航時，應攜帶足供全體組員及十分之一乘客 於此高度飛航超過_____分鐘以上之飛航部分使用之氧氣量。
questions.question_en: A flight shall not be commenced unless sufficient stored breathing oxygen is carried to supply all crew members and 10 percent of the passengers for any period in excess of _____ minutes that the cabin pressure altitude in compartments occupied by them will be between 10,000ft and 13,000ft.

questions.question: 加壓航空器攜帶之氧氣量於座艙失壓時，應攜帶飛航於艙壓高度_______呎以上足供全 體組員及乘客使用之氧氣量
questions.question_en: A flight to be operated with a pressurized aircraft shall not be commenced unless in the event of loss of pressurization, sufficient quantity of stored breathing oxygen shall be carried to supply all crew members and passengers when the cabin pressure altitude in compartments occupied by them will be ______ ft or above.

questions.question: 加壓航空器於二萬五千呎以上飛航時，應攜帶足供客艙全體組員及乘客(或乘員)至少使 用______分鐘之氧氣量。
questions.question_en: A flight to be operated with a pressurized aircraft shall not be commenced unless when operating at 25,000ft or above, sufficient quantity of stored breathing oxygen shall be carried to supply all the crewmembers and passengers in the event of loss of pressurization for at least a _____-minute supply for the occupants in the passenger compartment.

questions.question: (運輸業)全體飛航組員於艙壓高度_____英呎以上飛航時，應持續使用氧氣。
questions.question_en: All flight crewmembers of an air transport operator, when engaged in performing duties essential to the safe operation of an airplane in flight, shall use breathing oxygen continuously whenever the cabin pressure altitude is at _____ ft or above.

questions.question: 依最新天氣測報，如已知目的地機場及備用機場於航空器預計到達時間，其天氣未達最 低飛航限度者，駕駛員應中止向該目的地機場飛航。
questions.question_en: A flight shall not be continued towards the destination aerodrome,?unless the latest available information indicates that at the expected time of arrival, a landing can be affected at that aerodrome or at least one destination alternate aerodrome in compliance with the operating minima.

questions.question: 飛航中，遇非天氣因素所導致之危險情況時，應立即向何單位報告，以保障其他航空器 之安全。
questions.question_en: Hazardous flight conditions encountered other than those associated with meteorological conditions, shall be reported to_____ as soon as possible. The reports so rendered shall give such details as may be pertinent to the safety of other aircraft.
questions.A: 飛航管制機構及有關單位。
questions.B: 國家運輸安全調查委員會。
questions.C: 財團法人中華民國 台灣飛行安全基金會。
questions.A_en: The appropriate air traffic control unit.

questions.question: 航空器之作業應符合_____記載事項，並不得逾越飛航手冊之性能及操作限制。
questions.question_en: An aircraft shall be operated in compliance with the terms of its_____ and within the approved operating performance and limitations contained in its flight manual.

questions.question: 僅 _____ 直昇機得於密集區域之高架直昇機機場進行作業。
questions.question_en: Only ______ helicopters may be operated to and from elevated heliports in congested area.

questions.question: 提供機長於航空器之儀表、裝備或系統失效時，決定該航空器飛航前或於中途降落後繼 續該航空器飛航之依據者為：
questions.question_en: What manual will enable the PIC to determine whether a flight may be commenced or continued from any intermediate stop should any instrument, equipment or system become inoperative?

questions.question: 51人座航空器應裝置多少個急救箱?
questions.question_en: How many first aid kits shall a 51-seat aircraft be equipped?

questions.question: 255人座航空器應裝置多少個急救箱?
questions.question_en: How may first aid kits shall a 255-seat aircraft be equipped?

questions.question: 56人座運輸業航空器應裝置經多少個認可之便攜式滅火器數量?
questions.question_en: How many portable fire extinguisher shall a 56-seat transport category aircraft be equipped?

questions.question: 158人座運輸業航空器應裝置多少個經認可之便攜式滅火器數量?
questions.question_en: How many portable fire extinguisher shall a 158-seat transport category aircraft be equipped?

questions.question: 年滿_____歲以上乘客(或乘員)搭乘航空器時，航空器使用人應為其配備具安全帶之座 椅或臥舖，供其於航空器起飛、降落及飛航中使用。
questions.question_en: An operator shall ensure that a seat or berth with safety belt is provided to each occupant who has reached his or her _____ birthday, for the use of whom during the take-off, landing and enroute phases.

questions.question: 運輸業飛機應配備手斧______把，供機門或緊急出口無法開啟時砍破機體使用。
questions.question_en: An air transport airplane shall be equipped with _____ axe, to break the fuselage when the cabin door or emergency exit cannot be opened.

questions.question: 運輸業航空器載客座位數六十一人至九十九人者，應於客艙中配備電池供電之輕便擴音 器_____具，並置於客艙組員座椅周邊便於取用之處。
questions.question_en: An air transport airplane with a seating capacity of more than 60 but less than 100, shall have _____ battery-powered megaphone in the passenger cabin where it would be readily accessible to a normal cabin crew seat.

questions.question: 運輸業航空器載客座位數100人以上者，應於客艙前後各配備一具電池供電之輕便擴音 器，並置於客艙組員座椅周邊便於取用之處。
questions.question_en: An air transport airplane with a seating capacity of 100 passengers or more, two megaphones are required. One must be installed at the forward end and the other at the most rearward location where it would be readily accessible to a normal cabin crew seat.

questions.question: 運輸業載客飛機之各緊急出口應配備_____電源之緊急照明設備。
questions.question_en: An air transport passenger-carrying airplane shall be equipped with emergency lighting of ______ for each emergency exit.
questions.A_en: in common with other systems power source

questions.question: 航空器使用人應明確標示並告知乘客(或乘員)下列何訊息：
questions.question_en: An aircraft shall be equipped with means of ensuring that the following information and instructions are informed and notified to passengers:
questions.A: 繫妥安全帶、留置座椅及椅背豎直之時機。
questions.B: 氧氣設備之用法及時機。
questions.C: 救生 背心或個人浮水器具之位置及用法。
questions.A_en: When seat belts are to be fastened and when the seat backs are to be up- righted
questions.B_en: When and how oxygen equipment is to be used.
questions.C_en: Location and use of life jackets or equivalent individual floatation devices.

questions.question: 運輸業航空器飛航時，除備有民航法第三十八條規定之文書外，另應備有下列何文件：
questions.question_en: An air transport aircraft shall carry, in addition to documents required by Article 38 of the Civil Aviation Act, the following approved and updated documents/manuals:

questions.question: 航空器設有為緊急時搶救人員供砍破之部位時，應以_____色之長九公分，寬三公分線 條標示其範圍。並在必要時於線條外緣另加白色襯底，相鄰線條之間距不得大於二公尺。
questions.question_en: If areas of the fuselage suitable for break-in by rescue crews in emergency are marked on an airplane, such areas shall be marked in ______, and shall be outlined in white to contrast with the background. The lines for such marking shall be 9 cm × 3 cm, and be no more than 2 m between adjacent markings.

questions.question: 航空器使用人應於航空器上裝置________，以記錄供航空器失事調查使用之必要飛航資 料
questions.question_en: An aircraft shall be equipped with a _____ capable of recording essential information of a flight, in order to serve the purpose of aircraft accident investigation.

questions.question: 飛航紀錄器應於飛航前開啟，不得於飛航中關閉。但於航空器失事、航空器重大意外或 航空器意外事件發生後，______；其發生航空器意外事件經民航局要求者，亦同。
questions.question_en: The flight recorder shall be activated before flight, and shall not be deactivated in flight. However, in the case of an aircraft accident or a serious incident, the flight data recorder ______. Same requirement For an aircraft incident and required by CAA, the same requirement will apply.
questions.A: 應於飛航中止時即關閉飛航紀錄器。
questions.B: 於取出紀錄前，不得再開啟飛航紀錄器。
questions.A_en: shall be deactivated when the flight ends
questions.B_en: shall not be re-activated until the flight data has been retrieved

questions.question: 航空器依儀器飛航規則飛航，或須依賴一種或多種飛航儀表維持其所需姿態飛航者，應 備有______具氣壓高度表。
questions.question_en: An aircraft when operated in accordance with the instrument flight rules, or when the aircraft cannot be maintained in a desired attitude without reference to one or more flight instruments, shall be equipped with _____ pressure altimeters indicators.

questions.question: 航空器依 _____ 飛航時，應裝置磁羅盤、能顯示時、分、秒之計時器、氣壓高度表及 空速表各一具，並依民航局規定裝置儀表及裝備。
questions.question_en: All aircraft when operated as _____ flight shall be equipped with a magnetic compass; an accurate timepiece indicting the time in hours, minutes and seconds; a sensitive altimeter, an airspeed indicator and such additional instruments or equipment as may be prescribed by CAA.

questions.question: 長程越水飛航係指下列何情形
questions.question_en: A long-range over-water flight indicates
questions.A: 飛航於有備用機場之雙發動機飛機，飛越距陸岸逾2百浬或以單發動機故障時之巡航 速度飛越距陸岸逾60分鐘之距離
questions.B: 飛航於有備用機場之雙發動機飛機，飛越距陸岸逾 3百浬或以單發動機故障時之巡航速度飛越距陸岸逾90分鐘之距離
questions.C: 飛航於有備用機 場之雙發動機飛機，飛越距陸岸逾4百浬或以單發動機故障時之巡航速度飛越距陸岸逾 120分鐘之距離
questions.A_en: Twin-engine airplane with alternate aerodromes planned, used over routes on which the airplane may be over water and away from land at more than a distance corresponding to 60 minutes at cruising speed for one power-unit inoperative or 200 NM.
questions.B_en: Twin-engine airplane with alternate aerodromes planned, used over routes on which the airplane may be over water and away from land at more than a distance corresponding to 90 minutes at cruising speed for one power-unit inoperative or 300 NM.
questions.C_en: Twin-engine airplane with alternate aerodromes planned, used over routes on which the airplane may be over water and away from land at more than a distance corresponding to 120 minutes at cruising speed for one power-unit inoperative or 400 NM.

questions.question: 越水飛航之一級或二級性能直昇機以一般巡航速度飛越距陸岸達___分鐘以上者，應裝 置永久或可快速完成設置之浮具，且飛航組員應於飛航全程穿著救生背心，以確保水上 迫降作業之安全。
questions.question_en: Performance class 1 or 2 helicopters intended to be flown over water shall be fitted with a permanent or rapidly deployable means of floatation, and the life jacket shall be worn by flight crew during all phrases of flight so as to ensure a safe ditching of the helicopter when flying over water at a distance from land corresponding to more than _____ minutes normal cruising speed.

questions.question: 航空器飛航時，其艙壓高度高於_____呎者，應備有氧氣及其配送設備。
questions.question_en: Aircraft intended to be operated at a cabin pressure altitude higher than _____ft shall be equipped with oxygen storage and dispensing apparatus capable of storing and dispensing the oxygen supplies.

questions.question: 加壓航空器，其飛航高度高於______呎者，應備有警告飛航組員失壓情況之裝置。
questions.question_en: Pressurized aircraft operated above _____ft shall be equipped with a device to provide positive warning to the pilot of any dangerous loss of pressurization.

questions.question: 哪些是夜間飛航之航空器必須配備的設備?
questions.question_en: What equipment shall an aircraft be equipped when operated at night?
questions.B: 二具或一具而有二組獨立燈絲之落地燈
questions.B_en: two landing lights or one having two separately energized filaments.

questions.question: 哪些是夜間飛航之航空器必須配備的設備?
questions.question_en: What equipment shall an aircraft be equipped when operated at night?
questions.A: 具有照明之各項儀表及儀表板
questions.C: 各組員工作站位備有一具手 電筒
questions.A_en: illumination for all instruments and equipment
questions.C_en: an electric torch for each crewmember station

questions.question: 運輸業航空器飛航高度超過_____呎者，應於駕駛艙內備有測量宇宙間輻射量之裝置， 並顯示每次飛航累積之輻射量，提供飛航組員檢視。
questions.question_en: An air transport category aircraft intended to be operated above _____ feet shall carry equipment to measure and indicate continuously the dose rate of total cosmic radiation being received and the cumulative dose on each flight. The display unit of the equipment shall be readily visible to a flight crewmember.

questions.question: 航空器以馬克數表示速度限制者，應具有一具______指示表
questions.question_en: All aircraft with speed limitations expressed in terms of Mach number shall be equipped with _____ indicator.

questions.question: 下列何者屬於「接近地面警告系統」應備有之自動提供適時及明確之接近地面可能危害 之功能?
questions.question_en: Which warning shall a ground proximity warning system provide?
questions.C: 過度低於儀器進場下滑道
questions.C_en: Excessive descent below the instrument glide path.

questions.question: 航空器裝置之通信裝備應能透過緊急頻率_____百萬赫與地面連絡。
questions.question_en: The radio communication equipment of an aircraft shall provide for communication on the aeronautical emergency frequency _____ MHz.

questions.question: 裝置於航空器之通信及導航裝備，於任一具供通信或導航或二者共用裝備發生故障時， 不得造成其他相同用途裝備亦發生故障。
questions.question_en: The navigation equipment installation shall be such that the failure of any single unit required for either communications or navigation purposes or both will not result in the other unit required for communications or navigation purposes.

questions.question: _____ 對其航空器，包括航空器機體、發動機、螺旋槳、航空器各項裝備及其零組件負 妥善維護之主要責任並保持其符合持續適航標準。
questions.question_en: _____ shall bear the primary responsibility for the proper maintenance of its aircraft including the airframe, power plant, propeller, appliance, and their parts and maintained in an airworthy condition.

questions.question: 航空器使用人應訂定航空器________，報請民航局核准後，據以執行各種維護工作。
questions.question_en: The operator shall provide, for the use and guidance of maintenance and operational personnel concerned, a _____ approved by the CAA.

questions.question: 航空器使用人應訂定________，報請民航局備查後實施。受委託之維護機構亦應據以執 行航空器之維護。
questions.question_en: Operators shall provide, for the use and guidance of maintenance and operational personnel concerned, a ____ which shall be carried into effect after acceptance of CAA. A designated maintenance organization shall conduct maintenance in accordance with ____ of the operator.

questions.question: 航空器使用人應確保其所有維護人員接受________訓練，以符合航空器使用人所賦予之 職責及從事維護工作之計畫、執行、督導、檢查及簽證恢復可用作業。
questions.question_en: An operator shall ensure that all its maintenance personnel receive ________ training appropriate to their assigned tasks and responsibilities. The maintenance personnel shall be trained to be competence of planning, performing, supervising, inspecting and releasing the work to be performed.

questions.question: 航空器使用人訂定之維護訓練計畫應包含________ 訓練，以提升維護人員間及與飛航 組員之協調合作，減少人為因素造成之事故。
questions.question_en: In order to reduce human induced incidents or accidents, the training programme established by the operator shall, include ________ training, and in knowledge and skills related to human performance, including coordination with other maintenance personnel and flight crew.

questions.question: 航空器使用人應建立_________，訂定必需檢驗項目，由訓練合格並經授權之人員，依 航空器維護能力手冊之規定執行航空器之維護、翻修及改裝之檢驗工作。
questions.question_en: Operators shall establish a ________, identifying required inspection item and ensure the inspections of aircraft maintenance, overhaul and alterations, which have been completed by qualified authority personnel in accordance with the requirements of the aircraft maintenance control manual.

questions.question: 航空器適航之簽證人員，應持有有效之___________，並依航空器維護能力手冊之權限， 確實執行各項維護及簽放作業。
questions.question_en: The person signing a maintenance release shall be either the holder of ________, and shall ensure that operations in regard to maintenance and maintenance release be conducted as authorized by GMM.
questions.B: 航空器維修工程師檢定證或經民航局承認之有效檢定證
questions.B_en: a valid CAA aircraft maintenance engineer certificate, or the holder of a valid mechanic license acceptable to CAA

questions.question: 每項維護簽放紀錄內容應包括執行維護工作之依據及重點摘要、維護完工日期及簽放人 員之簽署。
questions.question_en: Records of maintenance release shall include the reference to the task, summary of the task, the completion date and the signature of the engineer who released the aircraft.

questions.question: 日常維護工作及日常維護簽放紀錄應以不褪色墨汁填寫並應保存____個月以上。
questions.question_en: Daily maintenance work and maintenance release records shall be recorded with indelible ink and kept for a minimum period of ________ months.

questions.question: 機長職責為何?
questions.question_en: What is the duty of a pilot-in-command?
questions.A: 機長在飛航中負航空器操作、機上全體人員及貨物安全之責，並得為一切緊急處理。
questions.B: 機長應確保程序檢查表之每一細節皆予履行。
questions.C: 機長於飛航終了時，應負責將已 知及可疑之航空器故障報告航空器使用人並對填寫之飛航紀錄負責。
questions.A_en: The pilot-in-command shall be responsible for the operation and safety of the aircraft and for the safety of all crewmembers, passengers and cargo on board during flight time, and may take actions as necessary in the event of an emergency
questions.B_en: The pilot-in-command shall ensure that the checklists are complied with in detail;
questions.C_en: The pilot-in-command shall be responsible for reporting all known or suspected defects in the aircraft to the operator at the termination of the flight;

questions.question: 飛航組員在工作席位之規定為：
questions.question_en: What is the rules of a flight crewmember when he/she is his/her station?
questions.A: 起飛降落時，因生理上的需要可以離開工作席位。
questions.B: 航路上，飛航組員在不影響 工作情況下，可離開工作席位。
questions.C: 飛航組員位於工作席位時，應繫安全帶，起飛降落 時應繫肩帶。
questions.A_en: A flight crewmember may leave his/her station due to physiological needs during take-off or landing.
questions.B_en: A flight crewmember may leave his/her station during cruise provided works are not jeopardized.
questions.C_en: A flight crewmember shall keep his/her seat belts fastened when at station, and shall keep the safety harness fastened during take-off and landing phases.

questions.question: 運輸業正駕駛員於最近九十日內，至少應在其檢定機型之同型航空器實施任一航路起飛 及降落_____次之紀錄，航空器使用人始得派遣其擔任機長。
questions.question_en: An air transport operator shall not assign a pilot to act as pilot-in-command of an aircraft unless that pilot has made at least ____ take-offs and landings within the preceding 90 days on the same type of aircraft for which the pilot holds the type rating.

questions.question: 運輸業航空器使用人應每十二個月對其飛航組員實施航路考驗_____次，對未經航路考 驗合格之飛航組員，不得派遣其飛航。
questions.question_en: An air transport operator may not schedule any pilot to serve as pilot of an aircraft, unless within the preceding 12 calendar months that pilot has passed ____ line check in which he has satisfactorily performed the duties and responsibilities of a pilot in the types of aircraft he is to fly.

questions.question: 運輸業駕駛員於任一機場、航路或空域執行飛航勤務時，除非於最近_____個月內，取 得或維持飛航該機場及之航路資格外，否則不得於該次飛航中，擔任機長之職務。
questions.question_en: An air transport operator shall not assign a pilot to act as pilot-in-command of an aircraft, unless within the preceding ____ calendar months that pilot has obtained or maintain his qualification on an aerodrome, route or within an area specified by the operator.

questions.question: 民航局或航空器使用人得依機場或航路之環境因素，指定其為特殊機場或特殊航路。駕 駛員除符合下列條件之一，航空器使用人不得派遣其擔任飛航該特殊航路或特殊機場之 機長任務。
questions.question_en: Due to certain environmental factors or terrain, CAA or an operator may designate an aerodrome or route as special ones for which an operator shall not assign a pilot as pilot-in-command to operate in such flight unless:
questions.A: 最近十二個月內至少一次於駕駛艙或模擬機中擔任駕駛員、觀察員。
questions.B: 由已取得 資格之飛航教師、檢定駕駛員帶飛該特殊航路或於該特殊機場完成起降。
questions.C: 完成經民 航局核准之詳盡圖文說明之機場及航路訓練課程。
questions.A_en: Within the preceding 12 months, the pilot has acted as a flight crewmember or observer in the aircraft or flight simulator;
questions.B_en: The pilot has operated on the special route or made at least one take-off and landing at the special aerodrome under the supervision of a qualified instructor or check airman;
questions.C_en: The pilot has completed the CAA approved training programme which incorporate diagrams and text in detail for the special aerodrome or route.

questions.question: 運輸業副駕駛員於最近 _____ 日內至少應在其檢定機型之同型航空器或民航局核准之 飛行模擬機實施三次起降，航空器使用人始得派遣其擔任起飛降落時操作該型航空器之 副駕駛員。
questions.question_en: An air transport operator shall not assign a first officer to operate at the flight controls of an aircraft during take-off and landing unless that first officer has made at least three take-offs and landings within the preceding _____ days on the same type of aircraft or in a flight simulator approved by CAA.

questions.question: 運輸業駕駛員年逾六十歲，不得從事單一駕駛員飛航任務
questions.question_en: An air transport pilot who is older than 60 years of age shall not engaged in single pilot operations.

questions.question: (運輸業)機長不得搭配資淺副駕駛員，除非其中至少一位具有該機型_____小時以上之 航路操作經驗。但航空器為新引進之機型者，不在此限。
questions.question_en: Except for aircraft newly introduced into service, a pilot-in-command of an air transport operator shall not be assigned a flight duty with a junior first officer unless either one of them has acquired an operating experience of no less than ____ hours flight time.

questions.question: (運輸業)新進駕駛員於累積航路操作經驗期間應有教師駕駛員或檢定駕駛員在旁督 導，如觀察飛航者，其時數_____。
questions.question_en: (Air transport operations)The acquisition of initial operating experience for newly hired pilots shall be conducted under the supervision of an instructor pilot or a check airman. The flight time in which a pilot serves as an observer is ______.
questions.B: 飛時除以駕駛人數計算
questions.C: 不可列計為航路操作經驗
questions.B_en: be divided by number of pilot
questions.C_en: not considered as part of operating experience

questions.question: 如副駕駛員於該機型航空器之飛航時數未達一百小時且飛航中能見度低於_____公尺或 跑道上有積水、泥濘或結冰現象時，則起飛及降落應由正駕駛員執行。
questions.question_en: In any flight, when a first officer has not logged 100 hours of flight time in the aircraft type in which he is to flight, the captain shall perform the take-off and landing when the visibility is less than _____ m or when the runway intended to be landed is covered with water, slush or ice.

questions.question: 駕駛員應具有飛航該檢定航空器機型累計至少____飛行小時以上，始得執行該機型各種 維護檢查後之試飛或特種飛航運渡任務。
questions.question_en: A pilot shall have logged at least ____ hours of flight time in an aircraft type before he is to perform test flights after maintenance or inspection, or to perform special ferry flight of such aircraft type.

questions.question: 運輸業航空器使用人應訂定考驗程序，於飛航組員之____起每十二個月內，應至少執行 二次，其間隔應在四個月以上八個月以下，且二次考驗內容不得完全相同。
questions.question_en: An air transport operator shall ensure that a pilot's proficiency check be performed twice within every 12 months _____. The interval of such two checks shall be between 4 months and 8 months. And, the content of the subsequent check shall not be identical with the preceding check.
questions.C: 檢定考驗及格日期或恢復資格考驗及格日
questions.A_en: during the valid period of his/her pilot license
questions.B_en: during the valid period of his/her medical license
questions.C_en: starting from the date when he/she pass the proficiency check or a re-qualification check

questions.question: 飛航組員體格檢查及格證上規定需配戴校正眼鏡者，
questions.question_en: When a medical certificate can be obtained only with correcting lenses, the applicant may be assessed as fit provided that
questions.A: 如當事人覺得視力尚可，可不用攜帶。
questions.B: 飛航時不必使用，攜帶身上即可。
questions.C: 飛航時應予使用，且另應攜帶備份之校正眼鏡一付。
questions.A_en: the certificate holder can fly without correcting lenses if he/she feels fine
questions.B_en: such correcting lenses are carried during flight but not necessarily be used.
questions.C_en: such correcting lenses are worn during the exercise of the privileges of the license or rating applied for or held; and, in addition, a pair of suitable correcting spectacles is kept readily available during the exercise of the privileges of the applican.

questions.question: 簽派員職責為
questions.question_en: Duties of flight operations officers/flight dispatchers are:
questions.A: 提供所需資料協助機長完成飛航準備工作。
questions.B: 協助機長完成飛航計畫，並依當地 規定向航管單位提出。
questions.C: 提供機長於飛航中安全飛航所必需之資料。
questions.A_en: Assist the pilot-in-command in flight preparation and provide the relevant information.
questions.B_en: Assist the pilot-in-command in preparing the operational and ATS flight plans and file the ATS plan with the appropriate ATS unit.
questions.C_en: Furnish the pilot-in-command, while in flight, by appropriate means of information, which may be necessary for the safe conduct of the flight.

questions.question: 簽派員於最近 _____ 個月內應至少於其負責簽派之其中一條航路之航空器駕駛艙內作 一次觀察飛航。
questions.question_en: Within the preceding ____ months, at least one observation flight on the flight deck of an aircraft over any area in which that individual is authorized to exercise the privileges of a flight operations officer / flight dispatcher.

questions.question: 簽派員連續停止工作_____個月以上者，非再經航空器使用人訓練不得執行其職務。
questions.question_en: A flight operations officer/flight dispatcher who has ceased to exercise the privileges of his/her license for ________ months or more shall not be assigned to such duty unless being given another flight operations officer/flight dispatcher training by the operator.

questions.question: 運輸業航空器載客座位數為五十一座至一百座時，應派遣 ____ 名以上之客艙組員。
questions.question_en: An air transport operator shall assign at least ____ cabin crewmember to a flight operated by an aircraft with a seating capacity of more than 50 but less than 101 passengers.

questions.question: 航空器使用人應執行客艙組員定期複訓，以確使客艙組員熟練下列何種事項?
questions.question_en: An operator shall ensure that cabin crewmember receive recurrent training on a regular interval to ensure that each cabin crewmember is:
questions.A: 在飛航中發生緊急情況或需緊急撤離時之職責及工作，包括對行動不便之身心障礙 者處理作業程序。
questions.B: 各項緊急及求生裝備之使用與緊急程序，如救生背心、救生艇、 緊急出口及滑梯、便攜式滅火器、氧氣裝備、急救箱、醫療箱及衛生防護箱等之使用方 法。
questions.C: 具有於一萬呎以上飛航缺氧及艙壓失效時之生理現象知識。
questions.A_en: Competent to execute those safety duties and functions which the cabin crewmember is assigned to perform in the event of an emergency or in a situation requiring emergency evacuation, including assisting the mentally or physically handicapped;
questions.B_en: Drilled and capable in the use of emergency and lifesaving equipment required to be carried, such as life jackets, life-saving rafts, evacuation slides, emergency exits, portable fire extinguishers, oxygen equipment, first aid kits, medical kits and unive
questions.C_en: When serving on airplanes operated at altitudes of 10,000 ft or above, knowledgeable as regards the effect of lack of oxygen and physiological phenomena accompanying a loss of pressurization;

questions.question: 載客四十四人以上之航空器應於幾秒內完成緊急撤離？
questions.question_en: Emergency evacuation from an aircraft of more than 44 passengers shall be completed within ________ seconds.

questions.question: (運輸業)客運航空器之駕駛艙門，於飛航中應_____。航空器使用人應提供方法使客艙 組員於發現有礙飛航安全之干擾行為時能通知飛航組員。
questions.question_en: (Air transport operation) The flight crew compartment doors in passenger-carrying aircraft shall be _____ in flight. An operator shall provide means by which cabin crewmember can discreetly notify the flight crew in the event of unlawful interference which may endanger the safety of flight.

questions.question: 航空器使用人應訂定相關之麻醉藥物及酒精測試規定，並對 _____ 等相關飛航作業人 員執行抽檢，檢測紀錄應存檔備查。
questions.question_en: An operator shall establish a programme to conduct random tests for narcotic drugs and alcohol for operations personnel such as ________. The records for such tests shall be retained for review.

questions.question: 麻醉藥物及酒精檢測檢查標準為：
questions.question_en: Test standards for narcotic drugs and alcohol include
questions.A: 麻醉藥物檢測：尿液樣本反應呈陰性
questions.B: 酒精濃度檢測：血液中酒精濃度不得超過 百分之零點零二
questions.C: 酒精濃度檢測：吐氣中酒精濃度不得超過每公升零點一毫克
questions.A_en: For narcotic drugs test: the test result of a Urine specimen shall be negative
questions.B_en: For Alcohol test: In the test result, the concentration of alcohol shall not be more than 0.02% in blood.
questions.C_en: For Alcohol test: In the test result, the concentration of alcohol shall not be exceed 0.1 mg per litre in breath.

questions.question: 普通業航空器使用人應訂定_________，報請民航局核准後實施。
questions.question_en: A general aviation operator shall establish and maintain ________ to be filed with CAA for approval.

questions.question: (普通業) _____ 於飛航前發現組員因受傷、疾病、疲勞、酒精或藥物影響等原因致無 法執行其職務時，應令其不得飛航。
questions.question_en: (General aviation operation) The _____ shall be responsible for ensuring that a flight will not be commenced? if any flight crewmember is physically unable to perform duties from any cause such as injury, sickness, fatigue, under the influence of alcohol or drugs.

questions.question: 普通航空業航空器載客座位數10~30人應於客艙裝置幾個便攜式滅火器。
questions.question_en: A general aviation aircraft with seating capacity of 10-30 shall be equipped with ___ portable fire extinguisher.

questions.question: 陸用或水陸二用飛機飛航於下列情形之一時，應具備供航空器上每一人員使用之救生背 心或個人浮水器具，並置於座椅或臥舖之周邊便於取用之處：
questions.question_en: Amphibians or landplanes, when operates under either one of the following conditions, shall carry for each personnel on board one life jacket or equivalent individual floatation device, stowed in a position easily accessible from the seat or berth of the person for whose use it is provided.
questions.A: 飛越距陸岸達五十浬以上
questions.B: 航路所經水面距陸岸逾其滑翔距離
questions.C: 起飛或降落航 道位於水面上
questions.A_en: Flying over water and at a distance of more than 50 NM away from the shore;
questions.B_en: Flying en route over water beyond gliding distance from the shore;
questions.C_en: During take-off or landing at an aerodrome, the take-off and approach path is over water

questions.question: 三級性能直昇機於陸岸距離超過自動旋轉滑翔距離時，機上人員應穿著救生背心或具救 生背心功能之救生裝。
questions.question_en: Performance class 3 helicopters, when operating beyond autorotation distance from land, all persons on board shall wear one life jacket or equivalent individual flotation device.

questions.question: 航空器維護人員執勤時間於連續七日內，應給予連續_______小時之休息，但擔任緊急 任務者不在此限。
questions.question_en: The maintenance personnel on board shall be given a rest period of at least ____ consecutive hours during any seven consecutive days of his/her duty, except for those who are performing emergency duties.

questions.question: (普通業)座位數超過三十座之飛機，應於客艙便於取用之處裝置 ____ 具便攜式滅火器 並清楚標示。
questions.question_en: (General aviation operator) At least ____ portable fire extinguisher must be conveniently located in the cabin of an airplane accommodating more than 30 passengers.

questions.question: 載運 _____ 名以上乘客及航程長度超過2小時之飛機，應配備1個醫療箱。
questions.question_en: An airplane authorized to carry more than _____ passengers on a sector length of more than 2 hours shall be equipped with a medical kit.

questions.question: 以強暴、脅迫或其他方法劫持航空器者
questions.question_en: Any person who hijacks an aircraft by force, threat or other means shall be subject to
questions.A: 處死刑或無期徒刑或七年以上有期徒刑
questions.C: 處七年以下有期 徒刑
questions.A_en: punishment by death, imprisonment for life, or imprisoned for not less than 7 years.

questions.question: 使用未領適航證書之航空器飛航者，處____年以下有期徒刑、拘役或新臺幣一百萬元以 下罰金；以無效之適航證書飛航者，亦同。
questions.question_en: Any person operating an aircraft without an airworthiness certificate shall be subject to imprisonment not exceeding ___ years, detention or a fine of up to NT$1,000,000. The same applies also to a person flying an aircraft with an invalid airworthiness certificate.

questions.question: 未領檢定證及體格檢查及格證而從事飛航者，處____年以下有期徒刑、拘役或新臺幣一 百萬元以下罰金。
questions.question_en: Any person who engages in a flight without a airman certificate and medical certificate shall be subject to imprisonment not exceeding ___ years, detention or a fine of up to NT$1,000,000.

questions.question: 以詐術申請檢定或登記，因而取得航空人員檢定證、體格檢查及格證、航空器登記證書 或適航證書者，處五年以下有期徒刑、拘役或科或併科新臺幣 ______ 元以下罰金。
questions.question_en: Any person who, by fraudulence in application for certification or registration, obtaining an airman certificate, medical certificate, certificate of aircraft registration or airworthiness certificate, shall be subject to imprisonment up to 5 years, detention or a fine of up to NT$ _____.

questions.question: 製造廠或維修廠之負責人、受雇人或其他從業人員，因執行業務，以未經檢驗合格之航 空器各項裝備及其零組件從事製造或維修者，處_____年以下有期徒刑、拘役或科或併 科新臺幣一百萬元以下罰金。
questions.question_en: The responsible person of a manufacturer or repair station, their employee or other hired person who undertakes the manufacture or maintenance with unapproved aviation products, appliances and parts, shall be subject to imprisonment not more than ___ years, detention, or in lieu of or addition to, a fine of up to NT$1,000,000

questions.question: 航空人員因技術上錯誤導致航空器失事或重大意外事件者，處新臺幣六萬元以上_____ 元以下罰鍰?或停止執業一個月至三個月；情節重大者，廢止其檢定證。
questions.question_en: Any airman committing a technical error that leads to an aircraft accident or a serious incident shall be subject to a fine from NT$60,000 to NT$__________ or be suspended from duty for a period of one to three months for any of the following; and in serious cases, the penalty shall be revocation of the certificate.

questions.question: 航空器所有權移轉時，未變更國籍標誌及登記號碼者，其適航證書仍有效。
questions.question_en: The certificate of airworthiness is valid if the registration number is unchanged when ownership of an aircraft is transferred.

questions.question: 登記證何情況失其效力
questions.question_en: The certificate of registration shall become invalid upon any of the following events:
questions.B_en: Aircraft is destroyed or damaged beyond repair.
questions.C_en: Forfeiture or loss of aircraft nationality

questions.question: 航空器適航證遇有下列何情形即失其效力：
questions.question_en: The certificate of airworthiness shall become invalid upon any of the following events:
questions.C: 航空器不合於適航安全條件時
questions.C_en: aircraft does not meet airworthiness requirements

questions.question: 航空人員基本條件應為：
questions.question_en: An airman shall be
questions.B: 完成國民義務教育以上學歷
questions.C: 中華民國國民。但經交通部核准者， 不在此限。
questions.B_en: one who has at least completed universal compulsory education
questions.C_en: a citizen of the ROC, unless granted a special approval by MOTC.

questions.question: 民航駕駛員於執業時須隨身攜帶檢定證及體格檢查及格證。
questions.question_en: When performing flight duties, a pilot shall carry both rating certificate and medical certificate.

questions.question: 民航法稱「飛航」係指航空器之
questions.question_en: According to the Civil Aviation Law, the term " flight" means
questions.A: 自客貨登機關機門至飛航後開機門。
questions.B: 起飛、航行、降落及起飛前降落後所需在 航空站、飛行場之滑行。
questions.C: 起飛航行至降落間之活動。
questions.A_en: The activities begin at passengers and cargo loaded and door closed till after flight doors open.
questions.B_en: takeoff, navigation in the air, landing of aircraft and its taxiing on the ground of an airport or of an airfield before takeoff and after landing.
questions.C_en: The activities begin at engine start, navigation till landing.

questions.question: 下列何種人員不屬於航空人員且不需民航局發給檢定證：
